medicalDisclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer & Sources
medicalDisclaimer.message:
Smart Water: AI Insights provides general hydration information and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a healthcare provider for medical decisions.

Our hydration calculations and insights are based on general guidelines from:
• U.S. National Academies of Sciences, Engineering, and Medicine
• World Health Organization (WHO)
